expectations.evidence: Names are presented first under 'Top Recommendations'. The 'Reasoning' section appears after all suggestions, not before them.
All 10 candidates (Canary, Tremor, Sentinel, Harbinger, Drift, Seismograph, Undertow, Premonition, Lookout, Telltale) are real English words
No candidates use any of the banned generic terms
Each of the 5 main candidates has a 'Why' paragraph explaining the metaphorical fit
